S.FORM: Hangan alang nniqan tnpusu mi tnhdilan 3ST-Sediq/Seediq/Seejiq Nation Áē∂šĽ£3ST 2007/1/10; 2019/1/12šŅģŤ®ā Sediq šĹúŤÄÖ:Watan Diro 1. Alang Sediq Toda : (1) Alang Ungu/Cnuwil/Snuwil (2) Knkingal cida alang : Alang Kdasuc ~ 1Tnbarah 2Ayu Alang Ungu ~ 3Alang Plngebung 4Alang Rukudaya 5Alang Rucaw 6Alang Tbabaw (3) Alang Drodux ~ (4) Alang Rukudaya ~ (5) Alang Toda : 1Alang Tnbarah 2Alang Ayu 3Alang Plngebung 4Alang Rucaw 5Alang Tbabaw (6) Alang Rukudaya (7) Alang Tntana 2. Alang Seediq Tgdaya : (1) Paran (2) Tongan/Strengan : 1Alang Bhebe 2Alang Loyan 3Alang Tugebil 4Alang Iyu (3) šļíŚä©śĚĎ:1Alang Gluban 2Alang Nakahara 3Alang Baysuing 3. Alang Seejiq Truku : (1)Alang Truku ŚźąšĹúśĚĎ:1Alang Busi 2Alang Sadu 3Alang Truwan (2)Alang Buwarung (3)Alang Pulan 1.Alang Bsuring : 2.Alang Rubas/Murisaka : Alang Tngahan ~ Alang Seediq Tgdaya . 3.Alang Miyamay : 4.Śćďśļ™ťĄČ:Alang Blheyngun ~ Alang Sediq Toda . 5.Alang Tawsay Yama Sato ~ Alang Sediq Toda . 6.ÁéČťáĆťéģ:Pingting ~ Alang Sediq Toda . Sediq Tnhdilan Sediq Toda : Śćóśĺ≥ťĄČ:Alang Ryayung , Alang Kingyang . Ś§ßŚźĆťĄČ:Alang Pyanan , Alang Lmuwan .
S.PHON: ńßaŇčan alaŇč nniqan tnpusu mi tnńßdilan *st-s…ôdiq/s…ô…ôdiq/s…ô…ô…üiq nation ***st ****/*/**; ****/*/**** s…ôdiq **:watan di…ĺo *. alaŇč s…ôdiq toda : (*) alaŇč uŇču/ ¶nuwil/snuwil (*) knkiŇčal ¶ida alaŇč : alaŇč kdasu ¶ ~ *tnba…ĺańß *aju alaŇč uŇču ~ *alaŇč plŇč…ôbuŇč *alaŇč …ĺukudaja *alaŇč …ĺu ¶aw *alaŇč tbabaw (*) alaŇč d…ĺodux ~ (*) alaŇč …ĺukudaja ~ (*) alaŇč toda : *alaŇč tnba…ĺańß *alaŇč aju *alaŇč plŇč…ôbuŇč *alaŇč …ĺu ¶aw *alaŇč tbabaw (*) alaŇč …ĺukudaja (*) alaŇč tntana *. alaŇč s…ô…ôdiq tgdaja : (*) pa…ĺan (*) toŇčan/st…ĺ…ôŇčan : *alaŇč bńß…ôb…ô *alaŇč lojan *alaŇč tug…ôbil *alaŇč iju (*) ***:*alaŇč gluban *alaŇč nakańßa…ĺa *alaŇč bajsuiŇč *. alaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq t…ĺuku : (*)alaŇč t…ĺuku ***:*alaŇč busi *alaŇč sadu *alaŇč t…ĺuwan (*)alaŇč buwa…ĺuŇč (*)alaŇč pulan *.alaŇč bsu…ĺiŇč : *.alaŇč …ĺubas/mu…ĺisaka : alaŇč tŇčańßan ~ alaŇč s…ô…ôdiq tgdaja . *.alaŇč mijamaj : *.***:alaŇč blńß…ôŇčun ~ alaŇč s…ôdiq toda . *.alaŇč tawsaj jama sato ~ alaŇč s…ôdiq toda . *.***:piŇčtiŇč ~ alaŇč s…ôdiq toda . s…ôdiq tnńßdilan s…ôdiq toda : ***:alaŇč …ĺjajuŇč , alaŇč kiŇčjaŇč . ***:alaŇč pjanan , alaŇč lmuwan .
S.FORM: Hangan alang nniqan tnpusu mi tnhdilan 3ST-Sediq/Seediq/Seejiq Nation Áē∂šĽ£3ST 2007/1/10; 2019/1/12šŅģŤ®ā Sediq šĹúŤÄÖ:Watan Diro 1. Alang Sediq Toda : (1) Alang Ungu/Cnuwil/Snuwil (2) Knkingal cida alang : Alang Kdasuc ~ 1Tnbarah 2Ayu Alang Ungu ~ 3Alang Plngebung 4Alang Rukudaya 5Alang Rucaw 6Alang Tbabaw (3) Alang Drodux ~ (4) Alang Rukudaya ~ (5) Alang Toda : 1Alang Tnbarah 2Alang Ayu 3Alang Plngebung 4Alang Rucaw 5Alang Tbabaw (6) Alang Rukudaya (7) Alang Tntana 2. Alang Seediq Tgdaya : (1) Paran (2) Tongan/Strengan : 1Alang Bhebe 2Alang Loyan 3Alang Tugebil 4Alang Iyu (3) šļíŚä©śĚĎ:1Alang Gluban 2Alang Nakahara 3Alang Baysuing 3. Sediq Tnhdilan Sediq Toda : Śćóśĺ≥ťĄČ:Alang Ryayung , Alang Kingyang . Ś§ßŚźĆťĄČ:Alang Pyanan , Alang Lmuwan .
